videos.title: How to Actually Draw Ghibli-Style Characters
videos.description: When the Ghibli AI trend exploded, Sam showed what it actually takes to draw in that style by hand — construction, color choices, and the subtlety machines miss.

videos.title: Anime Portraits the Real Way
videos.description: A masterclass in building anime portraits from scratch with proper anatomy, proportion, and that hand-drawn warmth AI can't replicate.

videos.title: Hand-Painted vs AI: What Gets Lost
videos.description: An honest breakdown of what makes hand-painted art fundamentally different — the intention behind every brushstroke, the happy accidents, the soul.

videos.title: Drawing the 'AI Look' Without AI
videos.description: That hyper-rendered, glowy look AI defaults to? It's actually a real painting technique. Learn how to do it yourself.

videos.title: Why Imperfections Make Art Better
videos.description: The wobbly lines, the uneven shading, the asymmetry — why these 'flaws' are what make human art resonate in ways generated images never will.

videos.title: Speed Paint Challenge: Can a Human Beat AI?
videos.description: A fun, high-energy challenge comparing hand-painted speed with AI generation — and why the journey matters more than the result.
